name: Majespecter Toad - Ogama
name_jp: マジェスペクター・フロッグ
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
undefined

[ Monster Effect ] 
When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Set 1 "Majespecter" Spell/Trap directly from your Deck, but it cannot be activated this turn. You can only use this effect of "Majespecter Toad - Ogama" once per turn. While this card is in your Monster Zone, your opponent cannot target it with card effects, also it cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Set 1 "Majespecter" Spell/Trap directly from your Deck, but it cannot be activated this turn. You can only use this effect of "Majespecter Toad - Ogama" once per turn. While this card is in your Monster Zone, your opponent cannot target it with card effects, also it cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
